messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

message.content: This section contains only the heading "独家视角" (Exclusive Perspective) and provides no substantive content. It cannot answer retrieval questions regarding specific topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. It functions solely as a structural title or placeholder, indicating a forthcoming or referenced exclusive viewpoint, but contains no retrievable data, factual claims, or supporting evidence.
